case_title: G.E. CAPITAL CORP./MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP. VS WILSON, JORDANA W.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $664.74 FILED BY G.E. CAPITAL CORP./MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, JORDANA W. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
